Notice Of And Motion To Compel Pltf To Attend And Testify At Deposition;Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-01-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Catherine Hughey's Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Attend And Testify At Deposition is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to appear for his deposition, to be noticed by Defendants, no later than May 25, 2007. Plaintiff's failure to appear for his noticed deposition was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $415, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
